data.title: Ethereum Foundation sold 10,000 ETH to BitMine OTC for the third time in two months.
data.description: The Ethereum Foundation sold 10,000 ETH to BitMine, marking its third over-the-counter transaction in two months. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Riot's Q1 2026 Revenue Reaches $167.2 Million Amid Bitcoin Mining Challenges
data.description: Riot reported a revenue of $167.2 million for the first quarter of 2026, with $33.2 million generated from its newly established data center business. According to NS3.AI, the company's Bitcoin mining revenue decreased to $111.9 million, down from $142.9 million in the same period last year. This decline was attributed to lower average Bitcoin prices and a 24% increase in the global hash rate, which impacted the results. By the end of the quarter, Riot held 15,679 Bitcoin, valued at approximately $1.1 billion.

data.title: India Shifts Strategy on Trade Barriers to Attract Global Firms
data.description:
India is revising its approach to trade barriers, moving away from previous strategies aimed at attracting global firms to relocate production within its borders. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting that the initial plan, championed by Prime Minister Narendra Modi, focused on increasing trade barriers to incentivize international companies to establish manufacturing operations in India. However, this strategy is now being reconsidered as the country seeks alternative methods to draw foreign investment and boost its economic growth.

The shift comes amid changing global economic dynamics and the need for India to remain competitive in the international market. By reducing trade barriers, India aims to create a more favorable environment for foreign businesses, encouraging them to invest and expand their operations in the country. This move is expected to enhance India's position as a viable destination for global manufacturing and investment.

The decision to alter the trade barrier strategy reflects India's broader economic goals, which include increasing exports, creating jobs, and fostering sustainable growth. As India adapts to new economic realities, the government is exploring various avenues to attract foreign capital and strengthen its industrial base.

This strategic pivot is part of India's ongoing efforts to integrate more deeply into the global economy, leveraging its strengths and addressing challenges to ensure long-term prosperity.

data.title: Bank of Finland Governor Urges Action on Public Debt
data.description: Finland must address its increasing public debt without further delay, according to Bank of Finland Governor Olli Rehn. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting Rehn's concerns about the nation's fiscal situation. The governor emphasized the urgency of implementing measures to manage the debt effectively, warning against postponement. Rehn's remarks underscore the importance of fiscal responsibility in maintaining economic stability. The Finnish government faces pressure to devise strategies that will curb the rising debt levels and ensure long-term financial health.

data.title: Binance Alpha will list Billions Network (BILL) on May 4th.
data.description: According to official sources, Binance Alpha will list Billions Network (BILL) on May 4th. Eligible users can claim the airdrop using their Binance Alpha Points on the Alpha event page after trading opens on Alpha. Further details will be announced later.

data.title: Bitdeer Reports Zero Bitcoin Holdings Despite Mining Output
data.description: Bitdeer, a Nasdaq-listed Bitcoin mining company, has released its latest Bitcoin holdings data on the X platform. According to Foresight News, as of the week ending May 1, Bitdeer produced 186 BTC through mining activities. However, the company sold an equivalent amount of 186 BTC during the same period, resulting in a net addition of zero BTC to its holdings. Bitdeer continues to maintain a zero Bitcoin holding position.

data.title: SolanaFloor Reports MEV Bot Manipulation on Meteora's ANB Pool
data.description: SolanaFloor has reported on X platform that a suspected MEV bot executed a price manipulation attack on Meteora's ANB pool. According to Odaily, the bot managed to convert $0.22 USDC into $696,000 USDC in a single transaction. As a result, the ANB token experienced a 99% decline.

data.title: A certain MEV robot exploited a Meteora pool vulnerability to turn $0.22 into $696,000.
data.description: SolanaFloor posted on the X platform that a suspected MEV bot performed a MEV-style pool price manipulation attack on Meteora's ANB pool, converting $0.22 USDC into $696,000 USDC in a single transaction. The ANB token price plummeted by 99%.

data.title: Recent Hacks Result in Over $606 Million in Losses Across 12 Protocols
data.description: In less than three weeks, 12 protocols have suffered losses exceeding $606 million due to various hacks. According to ChainCatcher, the Drift incident accounted for $285 million in losses, while Kelp DAO experienced a $292 million loss. These two attacks alone represent approximately 95% of the total losses.

data.title: Ethereum Mainnet Achieves Record Monthly Transaction Volume
data.description: Ethereum's mainnet has recently reached a historic milestone with its monthly transaction volume hitting 72.8 million transactions. According to ChainCatcher, this record-breaking activity is distributed across various categories: token transfers account for 62%, utility transactions (including inscriptions) make up 13%, financial transactions comprise 8%, cross-chain transactions represent 2%, and unmarked transactions constitute 15%.

data.title: AI TRENDS | OpenAI Reports Significant Increase in AI Code Writing Capabilities
data.description: OpenAI has announced a substantial improvement in artificial intelligence's ability to write code. According to Jin10, AI's contribution to code writing has increased from 20% to 80% within a month. This development marks a significant advancement in AI technology, showcasing its growing proficiency in software development tasks.

data.title: NATO Allies Agree to Allocate 5% of GDP for Investment, Spokesperson Says
data.description: NATO spokesperson Allison Hart stated that since the NATO summit held in The Hague last year, allies have agreed to allocate 5% of their GDP for investment. According to Jin10, Hart noted that progress has been observed in this initiative.

data.title: Cathie Wood Highlights Market Misjudgment of Disruptive Innovation
data.description: Cathie Wood has emphasized that the market is undervaluing disruptive innovation, particularly in the realm of Bitcoin, which she believes is valued far below its potential compared to the internet bubble era. According to PANews, Wood also pointed to the rise of stablecoins and decentralized finance (DeFi) as significant developments. Furthermore, she noted the integration of blockchain and artificial intelligence as a trillion-dollar opportunity.

data.title: GameStop Shares Surge 9% on eBay Takeover Bid Report
data.description: GameStop (GME) shares soared over 9% in after-hours trading on May 2 following a Wall Street Journal report that the videogame retailer is preparing a takeover bid for eBay (EBAY). According to BeInCrypto, the news has reignited interest among Reddit's retail trading community, reminiscent of the 2021 meme stock frenzy. GameStop closed up 6.33% at $26.53 on May 1, with after-hours trading pushing the stock to $27.61. eBay shares also climbed 10% to 15% on the speculation. CEO Ryan Cohen reportedly plans to take the offer directly to eBay shareholders if the board is unreceptive.

data.title: Iran Suggests Possible Resumption of War with the United States
data.description: Iran has indicated that the conflict with the United States might resume. According to Odaily, this statement comes amid ongoing tensions between the two nations. The possibility of renewed hostilities highlights the fragile state of relations, although no specific actions or timelines have been detailed. The situation remains uncertain as both countries navigate complex diplomatic challenges.

data.title: Digital Asset Market Report Compares Crypto Downturn to Historical Bubbles
data.description: A 2026 report on the digital asset market draws parallels between the current cryptocurrency downturn and historical bubbles in railway, radio, and internet sectors. According to NS3.AI, the report highlights that liquidity diminished following the 1011 incident, leading to the closure or strategic pivot of numerous teams. Additionally, the report notes that the rise of AI has attracted talent away from the crypto industry.

data.title: Bitcoin ETFs saw net inflows of $162.8 million this week.
data.description: According to Farside Investors data, Bitcoin ETFs saw net inflows of $162.8 million this week. Specifically, BlackRock IBIT saw a net inflow of $136.6 million, ARKB a net inflow of $50.1 million, and FBTC a net inflow of $48.5 million.

data.title: Iran says war with the United States "may" resume
data.description: Iran says war with the United States "may" resume. (Solid Intel)

data.title: ETH Whale's Long Position on Hyperliquid Shows $3.11 Million Unrealized Profit
data.description: An Ethereum (ETH) whale has accumulated an unrealized profit of $3.11 million from a long position on the Hyperliquid platform. According to NS3.AI, the position comprises 80,000 ETH, valued at approximately $182 million. This position was initiated from two separate wallets, with an average entry price of around $2,265.
